title: Identity Theft Prevention - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 6 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ANNUAL CREDIT REPORT.COM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Official website for requesting credit reports from the three major consumer credit reporting companies Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Also provides information about identity theft and how to report suspected identity theft. Optional phone number to opt out of prescreened or prequalified credit or insurance offers. Website Atlanta, GA 30348 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (877) 322-8228 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION NORTHWEST REGION IDENTITY THEFT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on identity theft, including immediate steps to repair identity theft, extending fraud alerts and credit freezes, and repairing credit after identity theft. 915 Second Avenue Suite 2896 Seattle, WA 98174 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Get Directions Visit Website More Details IDENTITY THEFT RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information, advice, and resources in regard to the topic of identity and cybercrimes. Examples of assistance provided may include assistance in filing police reports, determining what information scammers may have, filing reports with the Federal Trade Commission (FTC), notifying financial institutions, and document recovery, among other services. Eligibility: Individuals who are victims of identify or cybercrimes Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-5pm, closed federal holidays Email (888) 400-5530 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE UNIVERSITY OSU COLLEGE OF BUSINESS CENTER FOR ADVANCING FINANCIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advice, resources, and information to navigate college and make financial decisions, including self-study modules and coursework. Topics include paying for college (billing, financial aid, scholarships, and other resources), identity theft prevention, creating a budget, post-college financial planning, and more. 2751 SW Jefferson Way Corvallis, OR 97331 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Some services available outside of usual hours by arrangement. Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details SPECIAL EVENTS CLACKAMAS COUNTY CLACKAMAS COUNTY EVENT CENTER TIME TO SHRED IT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Bring up to four “banker” boxes or six brown paper grocery bags filled with paper to be shredded. The event will also dispose of old prescriptions and will be recycling old eye glasses, hearing aids, and cell phones. Hard drive wiping services will be available for $5 per device. 694 NE 4th Avenue Canby, OR 97013 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday, March 10, 2026 10am-2pm Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details SPECIAL EVENTS CLACKAMAS COUNTY MILWAUKIE COMMUNITY CENTER SHRED EVENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide a safe and secure resource to shred confidential documents on-site. Also will take unwanted or expired medications for disposal. 5440 SE Kellogg Creek Drive Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday, June 11, 2026 10am-1pm (503) 653-8100 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION NORTHWEST REGION IDENTITY THEFT OREGON STATE UNIVERSITY CENTER FOR ADVANCING FINANCIAL EDUCATION SPECIAL EVENTS CLACKAMAS COUNTY TIME TO SHRED IT SPECIAL EVENTS CLACKAMAS COUNTY SHRED EVENT
